exec_args.query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public';

args.query:
SELECT
  oldvalue__c as transfer_from_agent,
  COUNT(*) as transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  AND oldvalue__c != ''
  AND oldvalue__c ~ '^005'
GROUP BY oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
  oldvalue__c as transfer_from_agent,
  COUNT(*) as transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  AND oldvalue__c != 'None'
  AND oldvalue__c != ''
  AND oldvalue__c ~ '^005'
GROUP BY oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  CASE 
    WHEN oldvalue__c ~ '^005' THEN oldvalue__c
    WHEN newvalue__c ~ '^005' THEN newvalue__c
  END as agent_id
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND (oldvalue__c ~ '^005' OR newvalue__c ~ '^005');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  CASE 
    WHEN oldvalue__c ~ '^005' THEN oldvalue__c
    WHEN newvalue__c ~ '^005' THEN newvalue__c
  END as agent_id
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND (oldvalue__c ~ '^005' OR newvalue__c ~ '^005');

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
    AND (oldvalue__c ~ '^005' OR newvalue__c ~ '^005')
),
agent_cases AS (
  SELECT
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM assignments
  WHERE newvalue__c ~ '^005'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agent_transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c ~ '^005'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(ac.agent_id, at.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(ac.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled,
  COALESCE(at.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
FROM agent_cases ac
FULL OUTER JOIN agent_transfers at ON ac.agent_id = at.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(ac.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
    AND (oldvalue__c ~ '^005' OR newvalue__c ~ '^005')
),
agent_cases AS (
  SELECT
    newvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM assignments
  WHERE newvalue__c ~ '^005'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
),
agent_transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c ~ '^005'
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(ac.agent_id, at.agent_id) as agent_id,
  COALESCE(ac.cases_handled, 0) as cases_handled,
  COALESCE(at.transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count
FROM agent_cases ac
FULL OUTER JOIN agent_transfers at ON ac.agent_id = at.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(ac.cases_handled, 0) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
